name: Manobendra Mandal
description: Web developer with strong experience in building full-stack applications and Web3 systems. Worked on multiple hackathon-winning projects, focusing on real-world problem solving and scalable architecture. Currently working on contract-based product development in a startup , with growing expertise in low-level systems, backend engineering ( Rust, low level engineering), and modern web technologies.

name: Snehendu Roy
description: Co founder, Silone Labs. Software dev with about 6 years of experience along with 3 years of professional experience working in companies like Rump Labs, Infinititech Partners. Scaled products like axicov, mantle devkit and won multiple hackathons.

name: Abhirup Banerjee
description: Co-founder, Silone Labs, Axicov. Prev DevRel @ HackQuest. Developer Relations Engineer and blockchain consultant with experience onboarding 2500+ developers across global ecosystems. Built and shipped production-grade Web3 products spanning DeFi, ZK systems, and protocol infrastructure. 14x hackathon winner with strong focus on developer experience, ecosystem growth, and scalable decentralized architecture.

name: Sounak Dey
description: Full-stack developer, Software developer in Silone Labs. Participated in 10+ hackathons with team. Currently focusing is on rapid building and shipping products across web2 and web3 domains.

name: Dipan Srimany
description: I’m Dipan Srimany, a Full Stack MERN Developer turned DevOps Engineer at InfinitiTech Partners and a founding member of Silone Labs, a software engineering agency, passionate about building scalable, high-impact systems. I’ve engineered production platforms at StoriesDotFun and Lazarus Network, delivering performance-focused backend architectures for real users.

name: Jishnu Baruah
description: Currently working as a Blockchain SRE at InfStones. Skilled in Web3 and IoT technologies, with experience in web and mobile application development using React Native, Node.js, AWS, and distributed systems.

name: Mouli Chakraborty
description: SWE @Launchnodes. Advocate @HackQuest. 7x Hackathon Winner. Gen AI and Blockchain Developer with strong experience in building decentralized and full-stack products.
